creator: gmc@metro.cx
text:
Unable to install FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE and 10.0-RELEASE, 9.3-RELEASE works fine on this system.

This is a Dual Core AMD Opteron system, with two cpu's (4 cores total).

See attachments for screenshots of bios bootup screen, bios summary screen, non-verbose boot on 10.1-RELEASE and verbose boot on 10.1-RELEASE.

Have tried booting with ACPI disabled from the boot menu, but then the kernel stops booting because it needs a local APIC. Tried safe mode as well, same issue.

Output of pciconf -lv:

    vendor     = 'Broadcom'
    device     = 'BCM5785 [HT1000] PCI/PCI-X Bridge'
    class      = bridge
    subclass   = PCI-PCI
